messages.day_1:
👋 Hello Engr.!

I'm Chika from *Fred Baker's Automations* 🤖

I help oil & gas businesses in Abuja automate their operations using AI.

I believe *Eze Oil & Gas Ltd* could benefit from our *OpsGuard* solution.

Can I share a quick 60-second overview? 🙏
messages.day_3:
Hello Engr. 👋

Just following up on my previous message about *OpsGuard*.

We're currently onboarding 3 pilot clients in Abuja at a *special founding rate* — and I immediately thought of *Eze Oil & Gas Ltd*.

Would you have 15 minutes this week for a quick call? 📞

I can show you exactly how we've helped similar businesses save 40% of their operational time. 💡
messages.day_7:
Hi Engr.,

Quick update — we only have *2 pilot spots* remaining for OpsGuard this month.

Here's what you get as a founding client:
✅ 3 months free setup support
✅ Custom configuration for Eze Oil & Gas Ltd
✅ Direct WhatsApp access to our team
✅ Special founding client pricing

Are you ready to move forward? 🚀

Just reply *YES* and I'll send over the details right away!
